message:
feat(core): integrate WebSocket routing into App and server

Wire WebSocket support through the full application stack:

- BoxWebSocketHandler type and WebSocketRouteEntry for registering
  websocket handlers with path patterns
- AppBuilder::websocket() method for ergonomic route registration
- Separate ws_router in App for matching upgrade requests without
  conflicting with HTTP routes on the same path
- App::handle_websocket() performs path matching, injects path params,
  and dispatches to the registered handler
- StatefulParser::take_buffered() hands off already-read bytes to
  the WebSocket protocol layer during upgrade
- Server now uses serve_app() instead of serve_handler() to enable
  protocol upgrade dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
